sourceName: Central Bank of Sri Lanka — Policy rates
note: Tip OPR/SDFR/SLFR from historical_policy_interest_rates.xlsx effective 26.05.2026 (8.75 / 8.25 / 9.25); SRR 2.00 from plrates.php probe 2026-07-20. From 27 Nov 2024 CBSL uses a single Overnight Policy Rate (OPR); SDFR/SLFR remain as a published corridor only.
